moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, are in their final thrilling days, culminating in the Women's Singles final on July 11th and the Men's Singles final on July 12th.

angles.name: The Tension Builds
angles.copy: Who will lift the trophies this weekend at Wimbledon? The tension is palpable as the finals approach!

angles.name: London's Tennis Fever
angles.copy: London is buzzing with tennis fever as Wimbledon reaches its climax. Catch all the action and atmosphere!

moments.title: Goodwood Festival of Speed
moments.blurb: The Goodwood Festival of Speed, featuring historic and modern motor racing vehicles, continues until July 12th in West Sussex.

source.l: Goodwood Festival of Speed Official Website

angles.name: Need for Speed
angles.copy: Engines roaring, tyres squealing! The Goodwood Festival of Speed is in full throttle until Sunday. What's your dream car to see on the hillclimb?

angles.name: Motorsport Royalty
angles.copy: From classic beauties to futuristic beasts, Goodwood Festival of Speed has it all this weekend. A must for any motorsport fan.

moments.title: Bayeux Tapestry in UK
moments.blurb: The historic Bayeux Tapestry has arrived safely at the British Museum in London, marking its first time leaving France in 900 years, available for public viewing from today.

angles.name: 900-Year Journey
angles.copy: A piece of history makes history! The Bayeux Tapestry is now on display at the British Museum. Don't miss this once-in-a-millennium event!

angles.name: London History Unveiled
angles.copy: For the first time in 900 years, the Bayeux Tapestry is in London! Get down to the British Museum to see this incredible historical artefact.

moments.title: Edinburgh Jazz & Blues Festival
moments.blurb: The Edinburgh Jazz & Blues Festival kicks off today, bringing a diverse lineup of international and local talent to Scotland's capital until July 19th.

angles.name: Jazzing Up Edinburgh
angles.copy: Edinburgh is about to get jazzy! The Edinburgh Jazz & Blues Festival starts today, promising 10 days of incredible music. Who are you hoping to see?

angles.name: Scottish Summer Sounds
angles.copy: The Edinburgh Jazz & Blues Festival is here! Scotland's capital comes alive with world-class jazz and blues. Get your tickets now!

moments.title: Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod
moments.blurb: The Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod, a celebration of music and culture, continues its vibrant program in North Wales until July 12th.

angles.name: Welsh Cultural Showcase
angles.copy: Experience the magic of the Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod! This incredible Welsh festival runs until Sunday, showcasing talent from around the globe.

angles.name: North Wales in Harmony
angles.copy: North Wales is alive with music and culture at the Llangollen International Musical Eisteddfod! Don't miss the final days of this spectacular event.

moments.title: My Chemical Romance at Wembley
moments.blurb: My Chemical Romance play the first of two nights at Wembley Stadium tonight, with Sunny Day Real Estate as support.

angles.name: MCR Takes Wembley
angles.copy: My Chemical Romance hit Wembley Stadium tonight! Get ready for an epic night of emo anthems. Who's there?

angles.name: Welcome to the Black Parade
angles.copy: It's time for My Chemical Romance at Wembley! Two nights of pure rock energy. Which MCR classic are you most excited to hear live?

moments.title: The Human League in Leeds
moments.blurb: Synth-pop legends The Human League play Millennium Square in Leeds tonight, supported by ABC.

angles.name: Don't You Want Them?
angles.copy: The Human League are bringing their iconic synth-pop sound to Leeds tonight! Get ready to dance to some 80s classics.

angles.name: Leeds Rewind to the 80s
angles.copy: It's a night of pure 80s gold in Leeds with The Human League and ABC! Millennium Square is the place to be.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Top UK Chart
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds the number one spot on the Official UK Singles Chart for a second consecutive week, and its fifteenth week in total.

angles.name: Chart Reign Continues
angles.copy: Still at number one! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is dominating the UK Singles Chart for another week. An era-defining hit!

angles.name: British Chart Powerhouse
angles.copy: Fifteen weeks at number one for 'Rein Me In'! Sam Fender and Olivia Dean are proving unstoppable on the Official UK Singles Chart.

moments.title: Perrie Edwards Turns 33
moments.blurb: Little Mix star Perrie Edwards celebrates her 33rd birthday today, July 10th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Perrie!
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to Little Mix's very own Perrie Edwards, who turns 33 today! What's your favourite Little Mix track?

angles.name: Pop Queen's Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrate with us! It's Perrie Edwards' 33rd birthday. From Little Mix anthems to her solo ventures, she's a true pop icon.

moments.title: Jason Orange Turns 56
moments.blurb: Former Take That member Jason Orange celebrates his 56th birthday today, July 10th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Jason!
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 56th birthday to Take That legend Jason Orange! What's your favourite Take That memory?

angles.name: Take That Star's Birthday
angles.copy: It's Jason Orange's birthday today! Celebrating the former Take That star turning 56. Relive the 90s magic!

moments.title: Neil Tennant Turns 72
moments.blurb: Pet Shop Boys frontman Neil Tennant celebrates his 72nd birthday today, July 10th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Neil!
angles.copy: Huge happy 72nd birthday to the iconic Neil Tennant of the Pet Shop Boys! What's your go-to PSB track?

angles.name: Synth-Pop Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating the one and only Neil Tennant, who turns 72 today! Thank you for decades of incredible Pet Shop Boys music.

moments.title: Mavis Staples Turns 87
moments.blurb: Gospel and R&B legend Mavis Staples celebrates her 87th birthday today, July 10th.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Mavis!
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the incomparable Mavis Staples! A true living legend of soul and gospel music.

angles.name: Soul Icon's Celebration
angles.copy: Join us in celebrating the magnificent Mavis Staples on her 87th birthday! Her voice continues to inspire generations.

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing its third heatwave in two months, with temperatures soaring into the mid-30s Celsius across parts of England and the NHS issuing warnings.

angles.name: Stay Cool!
angles.copy: Another heatwave is gripping the UK! Remember to stay hydrated and keep cool as temperatures remain high.

angles.name: Summer Scorcher
angles.copy: It's a hot one out there! The UK is in the midst of its third heatwave this summer. Look after yourselves and enjoy the sunshine responsibly.

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar S2
moments.blurb: The second season of 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' premieres globally on Netflix this Sunday, July 12th, catching up with the cast after the pods.

angles.name: Pod Updates
angles.copy: Get ready for more drama! 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 drops on Netflix this Sunday. Who's excited to see what happened next?

angles.name: Reality TV Fix
angles.copy: Your weekend binge is sorted! 'Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar' Season 2 lands July 12th. Get ready for all the post-pod revelations!

moments.title: Somerset House Summer Series
moments.blurb: The Somerset House Summer Series with American Express kicks off on July 16th, featuring eleven nights of live music in the iconic London courtyard.

angles.name: London's Summer Soundtrack
angles.copy: The Somerset House Summer Series begins next week! Eleven nights of incredible live music in one of London's most stunning venues. Who are you seeing?

angles.name: Festival Vibes in the City
angles.copy: Get ready for summer nights and amazing tunes! Somerset House Summer Series starts July 16th. Perfect for catching breakthrough artists and established acts.

moments.title: The 154th Open at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins on July 12th at Royal Birkdale, with the world's top golfers competing for the Claret Jug.

angles.name: Major Golf Action
angles.copy: The Open Championship is almost here! Royal Birkdale hosts the 154th Open starting this Sunday. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Golf's Grandest Stage
angles.copy: One of golf's biggest tournaments, The Open, tees off at Royal Birkdale on July 12th. Get ready for some world-class links golf!

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: The London Athletics Meet, a highlight of the 2026 athletics season, takes place on Saturday, July 18th at the London Stadium.

angles.name: Track and Field Stars
angles.copy: World-class athletics are coming to London! The London Athletics Meet is next Saturday, July 18th. Who are you excited to see compete?

angles.name: Olympic Stadium Ready
angles.copy: The London Stadium prepares to host the London Athletics Meet next weekend! Don't miss the chance to see global stars right here in the capital.
